name: Tinyman
description: Leading Algorand DEX using constant-product AMM pools. Supports V1.1 (deprecated) and V2 with concentrated liquidity, flash swaps, and flash loans.

name: Pact
description: Algorand DEX offering constant-product and stableswap AMM pools with zap-in functionality and composable DeFi routing.

name: Folks Finance
description: Decentralized lending and borrowing protocol on Algorand. Supports deposits, loans, liquid governance via gALGO, and cross-chain lending via Folks Router.

name: NFDomains
description: Algorand naming service providing .algo domain names as NFTs. Supports profile metadata, avatar, verified addresses, and reverse resolution.

name: Vestige
description: Algorand DeFi analytics and swap aggregator. Provides asset price tracking, pool analytics, and aggregated swaps across multiple Algorand DEXes.

name: Algomint
description: Bridge protocol that mints wrapped Bitcoin (goBTC) and wrapped Ethereum (goETH) on Algorand, enabling cross-chain asset representation.

name: HumbleSwap
description: Decentralized exchange available on both Algorand and Voi. Provides constant-product AMM pools for ASA and ARC-200 token swaps.

name: Lofty
description: Real estate tokenization platform on Algorand. Enables fractional ownership of rental properties through tokenized property shares.

name: Goracle
description: Decentralized oracle network for Algorand. Provides off-chain data feeds, cross-chain messaging, and verifiable random functions to smart contracts.

name: CompX
description: Algorand DEX offering concentrated liquidity, limit orders, and DCA (dollar-cost averaging) functionality.

name: Cometa
description: Liquid staking protocol on Algorand. Enables users to stake ALGO while maintaining liquidity through a liquid staking token.

name: Pera Wallet
description: Primary mobile wallet for the Algorand ecosystem. Provides asset management, WalletConnect integration, swap functionality, and asset verification.

name: Defly
description: Algorand wallet with integrated DeFi features including swap aggregation, portfolio tracking, and charting tools.

name: Aramid Bridge
description: Cross-chain bridge connecting Algorand with other AVM-compatible networks including Voi. Supports native tokens and ASAs.
